name: Kahlua Creamy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square baking pan with foil.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar, marshmallow creme, milk, butter, Kahlua, and salt.
3. Bring the mixture to a rapid boil, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat; stir in all of the chocolate until melted.
5. Add nuts and vanilla.
6. Pour into the prepared pan.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. To serve, cut into squares.
9. Makes about 2 3/4 lbs.
